subject: feat(site): transform from file host to portfolio and resource hub
body:
glow-props was a bare CLAUDE.md file host with dead code (SessionStart
hook that only ran in this repo, sample text file). Rebuilt as a
portfolio site showcasing devmade-ai projects, internal tools, and
reusable engineering patterns.

- Built portfolio landing page with Projects (7 user-facing), Tools
  (4 internal), and Patterns (7 engineering patterns) sections
- Added dark mode with CSS variable tokens, localStorage persistence,
  cross-tab sync, OS preference fallback, and flash prevention
- Added print-friendly CSS (@media print, no-print class, break-inside)
- Removed dead SessionStart hook (.claude/ directory) — was self-referential
- Removed sample hello.txt file
- Updated README and docs to reflect new purpose

Tags: portfolio, site, dark-mode, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: portfolio-site
Semver: minor
